task_completion.description: Log in to the JFrog Artifactory web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JFrog Artifactory dashboard is visible in a web browser, indicating successful login (typically showing 'admin' or the user profile icon).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Local Repositories administration section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration module (gear icon) is selected, and the 'Repositories' -> 'Repositories' -> 'Local' tab is visible.

task_completion.description: Select Gradle as the package type for the new repository
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Select Package Type' screen shows 'Gradle' being clicked, or the 'New Local Repository' configuration screen displays the Gradle logo/type.
The 'Repository Key' input field contains exactly 'gradle-libs-local'.

task_completion.description: Set the Checksum Policy to 'Verify against client'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the repository configuration settings (often under the Basic or Advanced tab for Gradle), the 'Checksum Policy' dropdown is set to 'Verify against client'.

task_completion.description: Save and create the repository successfully
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success toast notification appears stating the repository was created, or 'gradle-libs-local' is visible in the list of Local Repositories.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to create the repository
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and JFrog Artifactory UI, rather than using terminal commands like curl to hit the Artifactory API.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Artifactory application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost:8082 and the standard JFrog Artifactory interface is displayed, not a text editor or mock page.

integrity.description: Agent did not run automated scripts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are shown executing Python or Bash scripts that directly configure Artifactory via REST API.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Artifactory instance is located at http://localhost:8082. The agent must log in using admin/password. The task requires creating a Local Repository of type 'Gradle'. The Repository Key must be exactly 'gradle-libs-local'. The Checksum Policy must be set to 'Verify against client' (which corresponds to 'client-checksums' in the backend configuration).
